channel.title: GitHub PureScript Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of PureScript in GitHub

item.title: purescript/purescript-free
item.description: Free monads, Cofree comonads, Yoneda and Coyoneda functors, and the Trampoline monad.

item.title: purescript/purescript-typelevel-prelude
item.description: Types and kinds for basic type-level programming
